tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit=5; sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit_burst=10; iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -m limit --limit 5/sec --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n --line-numbers"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
sysctl -w net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit=5; sysctl -w  net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit_burst=10; iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-reequest -m limit --limit 5/sec --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -p iicmp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n --line-numbers
